# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-25

Qwen released AgentWorld-35B-A3B, a 3B-active MoE trained to simulate MCP, terminal, SWE, Android, web, and OS environment responses to agent actions.

Went through 22 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B: MoE model trained to simulate agent environments
   Novel model class — environment simulators for agent loops — directly applicable to MCP tool testing and agent harness development.

2. Unlimited-OCR: 3.3B MIT-licensed multilingual OCR model for full-document parsing
   MIT license + full-document parsing + 32K output makes this a credible local OCR option for document pipelines.

3. Bunny DNS is now free
   Free DNS from a reputable performance-focused provider is a direct cost reduction opportunity.

4. The Coming Loop (Armin Ronacher)
   Directly describes the architecture pattern of nightly-librarian and multi-agent orchestration systems.

5. My Vibe Coding Adventure: Ten Takeaways (Stratechery)
   High-quality first-person account from a respected tech analyst — proxy for mainstream AI coding tool adoption.
